name: Forest Hill, Toronto
notes: Pilot week. Invite-only drop-in. The first real gathering — proving the concept in a room before anything goes public.

name: Toronto (Permanent Home)
notes: A property Drew made an offer on as of early 2026. If the offer comes through, this becomes the base of operations.

name: The Kawarthas
notes: A cottage his family lost to bankruptcy 20 years ago that he swore he would one day buy back. It became available.

name: The Icon, Toronto
notes: Return to the city for late fall.

name: Barbados
notes: A property Drew has access to. The winter residency.

name: Cape Breton, Nova Scotia
notes: A property on a cliff overlooking the ocean outside Chéticamp. Planned as the permanent inner-circle home for founding members.
